Examples.Title: Create a new job
Examples.Code:
### Create a new job
POST {{host}}/jobs
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
X-SM-Processing-Data: {{X-SM-Processing-Data}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json

## Responses
# 201
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 400
# Description: Bad request
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 403
# Description: Forbidden
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 410
# Description: Gone
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 429
# Description: Rate Limited
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json

Examples.Title: Delete a job
Examples.Description: Delete a job and remove all associated resources.
Examples.Code:
### Delete a job
DELETE {{host}}/jobs/{{jobid}}?force={{force}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The job that was deleted.
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 410
# Description: Gone
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 423
# Description: Locked
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 429
# Description: Rate Limited
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json

Examples.Title: List all jobs
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Speechmatics;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get job details
Examples.Description: Get job details, including progress and any error reports.
Examples.Code:
### Get job details
GET {{host}}/jobs/{{jobid}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 410
# Description: Gone
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 429
# Description: Rate Limited
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error
# Content-Type: application/json, application/vnd.speechmatics.v2+json

Examples.Title: Get the aligned text file for an alignment job.
Examples.Code:
### Get the aligned text file for an alignment job.
GET {{host}}/jobs/{{jobid}}/alignment?tags=word_start_and_end
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, one_per_line, text/plain, word_start_and_end

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json, one_per_line, text/plain, word_start_and_end
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 410
# Description: Gone
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 429
# Description: Rate Limited
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain

Examples.Title: Get the data file used as input to a job.
Examples.Code:
### Get the data file used as input to a job.
GET {{host}}/jobs/{{jobid}}/data
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/octet-stream

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 410
# Description: Gone
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 429
# Description: Rate Limited
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream

Examples.Title: Get the log file for a job.
Examples.Code:
### Get the log file for a job.
GET {{host}}/jobs/{{jobid}}/log
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, text/plain

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 404
# Description: Not Found
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 410
# Description: Gone
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 429
# Description: Rate Limited
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain
# 501
# Description: Not Implemented
# Content-Type: application/json, text/plain

Examples.Title: Get object URLs
Examples.Description: Get signed urls for data files associated to the job.
Examples.Code:
### Get object URLs
GET {{host}}/jobs/{{jobid}}/object-urls?ttl={{ttl}}&url_for={{url_for}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/octet-stream

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 404
# Description: Not found
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 410
# Description: Gone
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 429
# Description: Rate Limited
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream
# 500
# Description: Internal Server Error
# Content-Type: application/json, application/octet-stream

Examples.Title: Get the transcript for a transcription job
Examples.Code:
### Get the transcript for a transcription job
